pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and verifier.py exactly specify and check for these folder names.
setup_task.sh creates these junk domains in the HTML, and verifier.py checks against exactly this list.
setup_task.sh instructions and verifier.py check both specify a default font size of 18.
setup_task.sh instructions and verifier.py check both specify a minimum font size of 14.
setup_task.sh instructions and verifier.py both specify 'Tech_Sheets' as the expected download directory.
setup_task.sh instructions and verifier.py specify these exact URLs to open on startup.
setup_task.sh specifies 'ws' for wine-searcher and 'gs' for guildsomm; verifier.py checks for 'ws' and 'gs' keywords.
setup_task.sh requests enabling '#smooth-scrolling' and '#enable-parallel-downloading', and verifier.py explicitly checks for 'smooth-scrolling' and 'enable-parallel-downloading'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated bookmarks and specification files created by `setup_task.sh`. All configuration parameters claimed in the metadata, including the 4 required bookmark folders, 5 junk domains to remove, default font size of 18, minimum font size of 14, 'Tech_Sheets' download directory, 'ws' and 'gs' custom search engines, Chrome flags, and the startup URLs 'sevenfifty.com' and 'binwise.com', exactly match the generated instructions and are strictly enforced by `verifier.py`.
